module.name: balloon
module.description: Creates an interactive chat balloon UI with optional avatar image.

snippet.label: Speech Balloon
snippet.text: <!-- @balloon direction: left, name: Client --> Is it really possible to implement this requirement by this week? <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Interactive speech balloon with adjustable left/right direction.

snippet.label: Speech Balloon (Image)
snippet.text: <!-- @balloon direction: right, name: Support, image: https://via.placeholder.com/150 --> Yes, we can absolutely meet that deadline. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Speech balloon with a custom avatar image.
